creator: wblock@FreeBSD.org
text:
The shortcut page at https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/ shows this text:

Use the quick links below, if you want to report a defect or update.

    Report an update or defect to a port
    Report an issue with the base system
    Report an issue with the FreeBSD documentation or website

If the above quick links do not suit your needs or if you have an issue in a different area:

    File a Bug

Or check, if your issue has been reported already:

Neither of the two sentences with commas should have them.  The middle sentence can be clearer, also:

Use these quick links to report a problem or update:

Use the full bug report page to report other issues:

Or see if the issue has been reported already:
